dict.string: $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE)
OpenGlasses
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
OpenGlasses
APPL
$(MARKETING_VERSION)
$(CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION)
openglasses://
AR|YOUR_META_APP_ID|YOUR_CLIENT_TOKEN_HASH
YOUR_META_APP_ID
$(DEVELOPMENT_TEAM)
OpenGlasses plays music and controls playback hands-free through your glasses.
OpenGlasses uses Bluetooth to connect to your Ray-Ban Meta smart glasses.
OpenGlasses uses Bluetooth to connect to your Ray-Ban Meta smart glasses.
OpenGlasses accesses your calendar to tell you about upcoming events and create new ones hands-free.
OpenGlasses accesses your calendar to tell you about upcoming events and create new ones hands-free.
OpenGlasses needs camera access to capture photos and video for the AI to analyze.
OpenGlasses looks up contacts so you can make calls and send messages by name through your glasses.

OpenGlasses reads your health data (steps, workouts) to report fitness activity through your glasses. If you turn on "Share Health Data with AI" in Settings, your workout history may also be sent to your chosen AI provider so the fitness coach can discuss it; it stays on-device otherwise.
OpenGlasses saves workout data from fitness coaching sessions to Apple Health.
OpenGlasses controls your smart home devices hands-free through your glasses.
OpenGlasses scans your local network to find self-hosted AI servers (Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM, LocalAI) so you can connect without typing an address.
OpenGlasses uses your location to provide contextually relevant answers based on where you are.
OpenGlasses needs microphone access to listen for wake words and transcribe your voice commands.
OpenGlasses reads your step count and walking distance to report daily activity.
OpenGlasses saves photos taken with your Ray-Ban Meta glasses to your photo library.
OpenGlasses accesses your photo library to organize glasses photos into a dedicated album.
OpenGlasses creates and manages reminders so you can set them hands-free through your glasses.
OpenGlasses creates and manages reminders so you can set them hands-free through your glasses.
OpenGlasses uses speech recognition to detect the wake word and transcribe your questions for Claude.
CPTemplateApplicationScene
OpenGlassesCarPlayScene
$(PRODUCT_MODULE_NAME).CarPlaySceneDelegate
UIWindowScene
OpenGlassesDeviceScene
$(PRODUCT_MODULE_NAME).OpenGlassesSceneDelegate
